"<webfetch-citation source_id="aRGcaPMIgv6MXlCq34Tj-" />

Reebok accepts returns and exchanges of unworn merchandise within 30 days of the delivery date for orders placed through our official U.S. online store ([Reebok.com](http://reebok.com/)).

Items purchased in retail stores, international websites, or third-party retailers *(for example, department stores, resellers, or [non-Reebok.com](http://non-reebok.com/) sites)* are subject to the return policy of the original retailer and cannot be processed through our online portal.

To qualify for a return or exchange, products must be unworn, unwashed, and unaltered. Please ensure merchandise is in its original condition with all tags and original packaging (including the shoe box) included.

We want you to love what you ordered! To help you find the right fit while keeping things simple, we offer the following:

- **Free Footwear Exchanges:** Need a different size? We offer free exchanges on **shoes only**. We’ll waive the ...[truncated 968 chars]...ke it right. Please [contact us](/pages/contact-us) immediately so we can assist you.

**[START RETURN HERE](https://returns.reebok.com/)**

### Exchanges

Exchanges are available for footwear only. Prefer a different size? Exchanges on sneakers are free and easy. Please note that original shipping charges are non-refundable.  

### Returning Your In-Store Purchase

For items purchased in-store, returns are accepted within 60 days of the original purchase date. Merchandise must be unworn, unwashed, and have original tags attached. Footwear must be returned in its original box. In-store purchases can be returned at the original purchase location or at any Reebok retail store.

### Eyewear

We include a 1-year limited warranty on all products and custom lenses, from date of delivery. User damage is not covered under the standard warranty. If there is any defect on your products, contact us for replacement via Lucyd.co ([Customer support available 24/7](https://lucyd.co/))."

"<webfetch-citation source_id="fTONQgXvd2J3Jmv0zOrDO" />

## Shipping & Delivery

All verified orders will receive an initial email confirming the purchase, and a second email with tracking information.

Orders are evaluated by fraud detection services. If your order is deemed fraudulent / too risky to fulfill, payment will be voided and all funds will be released back to the original payment method.

Orders are typically processed within 1-3 business days of receiving verified payment information. Orders placed on Friday evening, Saturday or Sunday, or holidays will be processed on the next business day. Note that during peak seasons, shipments may experience slight delays.

| Shipping Method | Shipping Rates |
| --- | --- |
| Standard | $9.95 or  FREE on Orders $75+\* |
| Standard AK, HI & PR | $24.95 |
| Expedited | $19.95 |
| Express | $25.95 |

*\*Not available for Military, AK, HI & PR addresses.*

##### Estimated Shipping Times (after order is shipped)

...[truncated 399 chars]...

We currently ship to the 48 contiguous states, Alaska, Hawaii, & Military APO/FPO/DPO addresses. Items sent to P.O. Boxes, US territories, or military APO/FPO addresses can only be shipped via USPS.

###### Gift Cards

Physical gift cards can only be used in-store, while digital gift cards are valid exclusively on reebok.com.

###### Cancellations and Changes to Existing Orders

Once an order is placed, cancellations or changes to the shipping address or order contents are not possible. If a shipment is returned to us, original shipping costs (if applicable) will not be refunded.

###### Wrong, Damaged or Defective Products

If you receive the wrong item or a defective product, please [contact us](https://reebok.com/pages/contact-us) immediately.

###### Lost/Stolen Packages

Reebok is not responsible for lost, stolen, or damaged shipments. We highly recommend adding [Seel insurance](/pages/seel-insurance) at checkout, to ensure you are covered in these situations."
